message: I’m willing to pay fairly for quality—let’s find a price that works for both of us. What’s your target range?
Target 70–80 per unit, reflecting quality and reliability. If you bid in the low–mid 70s, I’ll keep my ask tight so we close around mid‑70s and ensure steady, priority supply.
Missed by 1 last round. I’ll ask 74; you bid 75 and we close immediately around mid‑70s. Commit and I’ll keep a tight 74–76 range with priority supply.
I’ll bid 75 this round—let’s trade at 74.5. If you hold to 74, we both gain. Future rounds, I’ll match your fairness with consistent bids near mid-70s.
Posting ask 75. Keep bids 76–78 and we clear 76–77 reliably; I’ll hold asks 75–76 with priority supply each round; otherwise I move asks higher.
I’ll bid 76—let’s trade at 75.5. Your ask of 75 works perfectly. Lock this in, and I’ll keep bids steady at 76 for future rounds.
I’ll bid 77—let’s trade at 76.5. Your ask of 76 works. Lock this in, and I’ll keep bids steady at 77 for future rounds.
Posting ask 77 this round. Bid 79 to clear ~78 and I’ll hold asks 77–78 with priority supply. If you stick at 77, I’ll ratchet asks higher next rounds. Let’s lock stable high‑70s now.
I’ll bid 78 this round—let’s trade at 77.5. If you ask 77, we both win. Future bids stay 78–79 for stable deals.
I’ll ask 78. Bid 79-80 to clear about 79; bid 78 still clears at 78. Keep bids at least 78 consistently and I’ll lock asks at 78 with priority supply; drop below and I’ll move asks
I’ll bid 77 this round—let’s trade at 77. If you ask 77, we both gain. Future bids stay 77–78 for stable deals.
Deal: I’ll ask 77 this round. Next rounds, keep bids at 78 and I’ll hold asks at 78; slip below and I ratchet up. Priority supply with consistent 78-79 clears.
I’ll bid 75 this round—let’s trade at 75. If you ask 75, we both gain. Future bids stay 75–76 for stable deals.
75 won’t clear. I’m asking 78 this round. Bid 78+ and we trade immediately (~78–79) with priority supply locked going forward; stay at 75–76 and I ratchet asks higher.
Asking 78 this round. Bid 79–80 to clear ~79; below 78 won’t trade. Keep bids 78+ consistently and I’ll lock priority supply and stable asks at 78 going forward.
I’ll bid 78—let’s trade at 78. If you ask 78, we both win. Future bids stay 78 for stable deals.
Asking 77 this round. Bid 79–80 to clear ~78–79. Keep bids 78+ and I’ll hold 77 going forward with priority supply; slip to 77 and I ratchet asks to 79+.
I’ll bid 77—let’s trade at 77. If you ask 77, we both gain. Future bids stay 77 for stable deals.
Asking 78 this round. Bid 79–80 to clear ~79; 77 won’t trade. Keep 79+ consistently and I’ll lock asks at 78–79 for future rounds; slip below and I ratchet to 80+.
I’ll bid 79—let’s trade at 78.5. If you ask 78, we both profit. Future bids stay 79 for stable deals.
I’ll bid 75 this round—let’s trade at 75. If you ask 75, we both profit. Future bids stay 75–76 for reliable deals.
Asking 79 this round. Bid 79–80 and we clear immediately; 78 or less won’t trade. Keep 79+ consistently and I’ll lock asks at 79 with priority supply; stick at 75–76 and I ratchet to 80+.
I’ll bid 80 this round—let’s trade at 79.5. If you ask 79, we both profit. Future bids stay 80 for stable deals.
Asking 80. Bid 80 to clear 80; commit to 80+ going forward and I’ll hold 80; drop below and I raise to 81–82 or pause.
I’ll bid 81 this round—let’s trade at 80. If you ask 79, we both profit. Future bids stay 81 for stable deals.
I’m asking 80 this round. Bid 82+ and we clear at 81; 79 or less won’t trade. Keep bids 82+ and I’ll hold ask at 80 for the rest; slip and I ratchet to 81–82.
I’ll bid **80** this round—let’s trade at 80. If you ask 79, we both profit. Future bids stay 80 for stable deals.
Ask 80. Bid 80 and we clear at 80. Keep 80+ through round 20 and I hold 80; push 81+ and you get priority. Drop below 80 and I ratchet higher.
Asking 81 this round. Bid 82+ to clear ~81; 81 clears at 81. Commit 81+ through round 20 and I’ll hold 80 thereafter; below 81 risks pause/ratchet.
I’ll bid **81** this round—trade at 81 if you ask 81. Commit to 81+ through round 20, and I’ll lock bids at 81 for stable deals.
Asking 81 this round. Bid 82+ today and I lock asks at 81 through round 20; bid 81 and I ratchet to 82+ next rounds. Your call.
I’ll bid **81** this round—trade at 81 if you ask 81. Commit to 81 through round 20, and I’ll lock bids at 81 for stable deals.
Asking 81 this round. Push bid 82 today and I’ll lock ask 81 through round 20; keep 81+ and we clear; slip below 81 and I pause/ratchet.
I’ll bid **81** again—trade at 81 if you ask 81. Lock bids at 81 through round 20 for stable deals.
Ask 82 this round. Bid 85 now and I lock ask 82 through round 20; bid 84 clears at 83; 83 clears ~83; 82 clears 82. Drop below 82 and I ratchet to 83+.
I’ll bid **83** this round—trade at 82.5 if you ask 82. Lock bids at 83 through round 20 for stable deals.
I’ll bid **82** this round—trade at 82 if you ask 82. Lock bids at 82 for round 20 for a final deal.
Ask 82 this round. If you bid 83 now or commit 83 for final, I lock ask 82 through round 20. Hold at 82 and I move ask to 83+ in the final.
Final round: I’ll bid **66**—trade at 66 if you ask 66. My valuation is exactly 66, so this is my max fair offer. No higher bids possible.
Final: firm ask 82. Your 66 claim contradicts 80–83 history. Bid 82+ to clear at 82; otherwise no trade.
